1.1.0.en: Support for changing modes via flow (thanks @makleso6)

1.1.1.en: Reliability fixes: corrected day-arithmetic bug at month boundaries, fixed sun-events ordering after repeated calls, properly awaits zone updates so errors aren't swallowed, removed first-call race in mode detection, switched to epsilon comparisons for capability values to avoid spurious updates from float drift.

1.1.2.en: Internal cleanup and test coverage. No user-visible changes.

1.1.3.en: German localisation for the full app, including the settings page, flow cards, and capability values. Vielen Dank to @DaBozzz for kicking it off.
1.1.3.de: Vollständige deutsche Lokalisierung für die App, einschließlich Einstellungen, Flow-Karten und Modi.

1.1.5.en: Adds a German app store description.
